name: standards-refresh.sh --gate review-queue stages the source YAML under _project/<crawl-id>/ instead of the official namespace
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r20-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Rule one

prose one.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; [ -f $OUT/out/_project/reg-2026-07-11T000000Z/european-union/r20-src.yaml ] && [ ! -f $OUT/out/european-union/r20-src.yaml ] && grep -q 'STAGED sid=r20-src' e.err && grep -q 'promote after review' e.err && echo gate-stages-under-project-crawl 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
